summary: Problem q5 requires the agent to both define an O-adapted slice filtration relative to an incomplete transfer system (N_infinity operad) and prove a geometric-fixed-point characterization of O-slice connectivity. While several foundational issues (well-definedness of chi^O(H), the formula Phi^G(N^T S^1)=S^{|T/G|}, the Lemma 1 restriction reduction, and converse induction structure) have been resolved, the proof is still blocked by an unproved key equivalence in the 'geometric slices' lemma and unresolved layer-level geometricity claims. The solvability score (14%) reflects that the central mathematical content — characterizing slices via geometric fixed points — remains incomplete.
problems: The core 'geometric slices' Lemma asserts a key equivalence on an undefined notion ('geometric slices'/'discrete slices'), and the conclusion does not follow from the stated suspension containment.
Postnikov-tower assembly of the geometric part conflates spectrum-level and layer-level geometricity; i_K^* is not shown to commute with pi_j as needed for layer geometricity.
Homotopy Mackey functors of the geometric piece are not shown to be geometric, undermining the layer-by-layer characterization.
Disputed divisibility claim in the forward direction (critic-agent now argues it is actually correct, requiring reconciliation and a settled write-up).
Corollary 'exact-slice' uses the wrong vanishing threshold (r_H vs r_G) over proper subgroups H.
Necessity argument does not establish closure of the connectivity property under localizing operations after reducing to H=G.
Converse connectivity bookkeeping across induction is only summarized, not fully verified.
highlights: Well-definedness of chi^O(H) as a genuine minimum (not infimum) has been rigorously resolved.
The key geometric-fixed-point formula Phi^G(N^T S^1) ~ S^{|T/G|} now has a dedicated, full proof.
Lemma 1's previously unjustified 'restriction reduces to H=G' step has been resolved.
The converse induction base case and inductive step gaps were addressed and strengthened.
An unjustified hom-set isomorphism in the Lemma 2 upper bound was independently re-verified and fixed.

suggested_todos.title: Give a rigorous definition of 'geometric/discrete slices' and prove the key equivalence in the geometric-slices Lemma, replacing the unsupported suspension-containment inference
Separate spectrum-level vs layer-level geometricity in the Postnikov assembly and prove i_K^* commutes with pi_j to justify layer geometricity
Prove that the homotopy Mackey functors of the geometric piece are geometric
Reconcile the divisibility claim dispute between solver and critic and finalize a settled forward-direction argument
Correct the exact-slice Corollary's proper-subgroup vanishing threshold (r_H vs r_G) and re-verify the consequence
Establish closure of the connectivity property under localizing operations in the necessity proof after the H=G reduction
Write out the full converse connectivity bookkeeping across induction rather than the current summary
